name: zarchive_list_push_back_payload
description: zArchiveList::PushBackPayload appends a payload node at the tail of a circular archive list and returns the updated count, with null-list failure returning -1.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zArchiveList_PushBackPayload@8 at 0x48ca30 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 8 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 60 bytes and the VC object symbol is 64 bytes with 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smokes exercise empty-list append, non-empty tail append, payload order, and archive mount insertion through g_zArchive_MountedList.
